response.justification: Bogdan has 13+ years of solid software engineering experience and demonstrates strong craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, distributed systems, low-latency work in DLang), but the role specifically demands a hands-on C++ engineer with industrial-automation and IEC 62443 security background. His only C++ exposure is a ~6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015 and a university thesis project. There is no evidence of MQTT, message brokers in production, industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850), or Secure Development Lifecycle work per IEC 62443. The career trajectory points firmly toward TypeScript/Node.js full-stack and DLang systems work, not modern C++ industrial platforms.
strengths: 13+ years of broad engineering experience including low-latency, multi-threaded systems work at Sociomantic
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, CI/CD, testing tools authorship
Some systems/embedded exposure (DLang fibers, async I/O, C/C++ at NI LabWindows/CVI, bachelor thesis with Jack audio + C++)
concerns: C++ experience is minimal (~6 months a decade ago) and not at the senior architectural level the role requires
No demonstrated experience with IEC 62443, Secure Development Lifecycle, or industrial cybersecurity standards
No exposure to MQTT, industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850, DNP 3.0), or industrial-automation domain

key_factors.factor: No IEC 62443 / SDL or industrial-automation domain background
Strong general engineering craftsmanship and systems-level experience
